subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-08 in Edinburgh
subcodes.first_line: It was a good gathering. I saw that the poor were very glad… When we were living in Baghdad, and a poor soul came to our home, he noticed a small rug
subcodes.first_line_orig: خوب مجلسي بود فقرارا بسيار مسرور ديدم... وقتی در بغداد فقیری در منزل ما آمد قالیچه ي
subcodes.subjects: @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
